name: loop-vscode
description: Syntax, formatting, completion, and a ▶ Play button for the Loop (.loop) DSL.

enumDescriptions: Ask each time which way to run.
Open a Claude Code session in the integrated terminal and run the loop there (interactive — you watch every step and answer gates in chat).
Run headless via the CLI and stream the trace into the VS Code 'Loop' output panel.
loop.runMode.markdownDescription:
What the ▶ Play button does:

- **ask** — prompt each run (output panel vs Claude Code session)
- **session** — open a Claude Code session and run `/loop run <file>` there
- **output** — run headless, stream the trace into the VS Code output panel

loop.claudePath.description: Path to the Claude Code CLI, used when running a loop in a session. Default: `claude` on your PATH.

loop.cliPath.description: Path to the `loop` CLI (dist/cli.js), used for output-panel runs. Defaults to the bundled @loop/runtime.

loop.model.description: Model alias passed to Claude Code (e.g. opus, sonnet). Empty = CLI/session default.
